% Fig R2 (lognormal payoff): no-learning weighted 1-R^2 vs tau
% v in {0.6065, 1.6487} (2-state lognormal, sigma=1.0), W=1.0
% Regression target zeta(p) = log((p-vL)/(vH-p)) on T* = tau*(u1+u2+u3)
% Weights w = 1/2 (prod f_1 + prod f_0) (ex-ante signal density)
% G=20 UMAX=5.0 K=3, gammas in {0.5, 1.0, 4.0}

% gamma = 0.5
\addplot coordinates {(0.1000,0.000284)(0.1359,0.000828)(0.1848,0.002216)(0.2512,0.005234)(0.3415,0.010477)(0.4642,0.017532)(0.6310,0.025432)(0.8577,0.033942)(1.1659,0.043281)(1.5849,0.053552)(2.1544,0.064787)(2.9286,0.076584)(3.9811,0.087570)(5.4117,0.095439)(7.3564,0.098618)(10.0000,0.098005)};

\addplot coordinates {(0.1000,0.000039)(0.1359,0.000120)(0.1848,0.000349)(0.2512,0.000923)(0.3415,0.002131)(0.4642,0.004193)(0.6310,0.007128)(0.8577,0.011050)(1.1659,0.016300)(1.5849,0.023158)(2.1544,0.031714)(2.9286,0.041764)(3.9811,0.052266)(5.4117,0.060872)(7.3564,0.065688)(10.0000,0.067806)};
